current_route_registry.next_step: Return a deterministic SkillGuard route decision.
Run plan-skill with a repository-local skill idea JSON file.
Run generate-skill with a valid Skill Blueprint after review.
Run generate-suite with a valid Suite Blueprint after review.
Run compile-contract against the target skill before expecting runtime phase checks.
Run check-contract against the target skill work contract.
Run check-depth when a target skill contract must prove source-specific obligations, current run evidence, and non-parallel route binding.
Run check-readme-release before publishing README-facing SkillGuard releases.
Run audit-installed-skills against the installed user skill root before broad installed-skill coverage claims.
Run select-route before starting a SkillGuard-governed task run.
Run start-run after select-route has chosen the route.
Run check-run against the current run record before claiming progress or closure.
Run close-run only after check-run supports the requested closure decision.
Run check-skill against the target skill directory.
Run check-suite against suite records and member paths.
Run fixture-test against an explicit fixture manifest.
Run detect-stale-evidence against current evidence-bearing JSON artifacts.
Run refresh-maintenance against stale evidence records, first in dry-run mode unless execution is explicitly requested.
Run review-checker-change against the approved checker-change baseline and current evidence metadata.
Run check-maintenance-record against a canonical or supported legacy maintenance record JSON artifact.
Run make-closure with current reports and direct evidence references.
Run self-check against the SkillGuard skill target.
Run inventory against the target path.

residual_risk: This local command does not provide fixture coverage, suite automation, package publication, or code-contract validation.
